name: vesper-contracts-tests
description: Run unit tests on this project.

scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint 2>/dev/null || echo 'No lint script in frontend'
scripts.format:check: cd frontend && npm run format:check 2>/dev/null || echo 'No format check in frontend'
scripts.build:testnet: cd frontend && VITE_NETWORK=testnet npm run build
